tasks.description:
[workshop] Add a Workshop section pointer to README

Add a short Workshop section to README.md that links to docs/workshop/INDEX.md so workshop participants find the kit immediately.

**Files:** README.md

## Acceptance
- README.md has a '## Workshop kit' heading (one per file)
- Section is at most 8 lines
- Contains a relative link to docs/workshop/INDEX.md
- Mentions HackSprint1 by name

## Test
- grep -q '## Workshop kit' README.md
- grep -q 'docs/workshop/INDEX.md' README.md
- grep -q 'HackSprint1' README.md
acceptance_criteria: README.md has a '## Workshop kit' heading (one per file)
Contains a relative link to docs/workshop/INDEX.md
